    VoidBlock - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.blocks
    The VoidBlock class represents a block that acts as a void or empty space but is still considered a wall.
    VoidBlock() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.blocks.VoidBlock
     
    VoidLevelNode - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.levelGraph
     
    VoidLevelNode(int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.levelGraph.VoidLevelNode
    VoidLevelNode exists only because I had to add at least some Node to the LevelNodes in LevelGraph.java It should never be used for anything else
